𝗦𝗪𝗔𝗥𝗠𝗦 | Orchestrating and managing enterprise-grade, production-ready multi-agent AI systems.  🌟 Rising Fast!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Orchestrating and managing enterprise-grade, production-ready multi-agent AI systems.
📅 Created: May 2023 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Production-Ready Infrastructure
✅ High Availability Systems
✅ Modular Microservices Design
✅ Hierarchical Agent Swarms
✅ Parallel Processing Pipelines
✅ Sequential Workflow Orchestration
✅ Graph-Based Agent Networks
✅ Multi-Model Provider Support
✅ Custom Agent Development Framework
✅ Backwards Compatibility with LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI
✅ Concurrent Multi-Agent Processing
✅ Intelligent Resource Management
✅ Load Balancing & Auto-Scaling


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🍴 791 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 55 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Swarms is an enterprise-grade, production-ready framework for orchestrating multi-agent systems. It provides a robust infrastructure for building, deploying, and managing complex AI agent workflows, supporting hierarchical and parallel processing, and integrating with various AI models and tools.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗜𝗠𝗚𝗖𝗢𝗠𝗣𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗦 | To provide a comprehensive, self-hosted solution for all common image manipulation tasks, ensuring user privacy and data security by processing images locally via Docker.  🔥 Super Hot!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a comprehensive, self-hosted solution for all common image manipulation tasks, ensuring user privacy and data security by processing images locally via Docker.
📅 Created: Dec 2024 • Updated: Mar 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Offline and privacy-first image processing
✅ Supports 70+ image formats (including PSD, HEIC, TIFF, EPS, PDF)
✅ AI-powered background removal (runs locally)
✅ Image compression, conversion, and resizing
✅ Batch processing capabilities
✅ Runs entirely within Docker for easy deployment and system cleanliness
✅ Web UI for user interaction


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 140 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 13 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ImgCompress is a privacy-focused, self-hosted image processing tool that runs entirely within Docker. It offers a wide range of functionalities including compression, conversion, resizing, batch processing, and AI-powered background removal for over 70 image formats, all without relying on cloud services.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗦𝗖𝗨𝗗𝗔 | Enabling CPU-only machines to access and leverage GPUs on remote machines for tasks like local testing, aggregated GPU pooling, and remote model training.  🔥 Super Hot!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔨 C++ 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling CPU-only machines to access and leverage GPUs on remote machines for tasks like local testing, aggregated GPU pooling, and remote model training.
📅 Created: Aug 2024 • Updated: Mar 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ GPU over IP bridge
✅ Remote GPU attachment to CPU-only machines
✅ Support for CUDA libraries (cuBLAS, cuDNN)
✅ Unified Memory support
✅ RPC call generation via codegen
✅ Server and client architecture
✅ LD_PRELOAD for client execution


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 82 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 15 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SCUDA is a C++ based GPU-over-IP bridge that allows CPU-only machines to access and utilize GPUs located on remote machines. It facilitates distributed GPU resource pooling and remote development/testing by creating a virtual GPU connection over a network.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/kevmo314/scuda

𝗚𝗢𝗠𝗣𝗛𝗢𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗥𝗜𝗨𝗠 | Interacting with the Mastodon social network via a terminal-based interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Interacting with the Mastodon social network via a terminal-based interface.
📅 Created: Apr 2021 • Updated: Mar 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Command-line Mastodon client
✅ Text-based User Interface (TUI)
✅ CLI for Mastodon interaction
✅ Timeline viewing and posting functionality
✅ Authentication with Mastodon instances
✅ Support for various Mastodon actions (reply, boost, favorite, etc.)


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Gomphotherium is a command-line Mastodon client that offers both a command-line interface (CLI) and a text-based user interface (TUI). It allows users to interact with their Mastodon instance, view timelines, and post messages directly from their terminal.

Glasskube is an open-source package manager for Kubernetes, designed to simplify the deployment, updating, and configuration of applications. It offers both a GUI and a CLI, making Kubernetes package management as easy as using tools like Homebrew or npm.
